changes.summary: getCommunityMembers now derives daily cap from settings.dailyEmission (with quotaEnabled and future-vision rules matching wallets.router) instead of getEffectiveMeritSettings().dailyQuota. Response quota object uses dailyEmission field; aggregation pipeline renamed effectiveDailyQuota → effectiveDailyEmission.
Added MemberQuotaDisplay type and memberQuotaDisplayFromApi / hasMemberQuotaDisplay helpers using dailyEmission vocabulary for member-list quota display paths.

Recreated minimal module (full component was deleted as unused in a9583ced) exporting communityMemberQuotaDisplay and re-exporting useWallet quota display helpers; no dailyQuota in this quota display path.

notes: MembersTab full UI component was removed upstream (chore(web): remove unused components); restored as thin quota-display vocabulary module per write_set. Downstream consumers (useCommunityMembers type, MemberInfoCard, community-members-aggregation.spec.ts) still reference dailyQuota and are out of write_set for follow-up units.
